headline: The Top 5 Analyst Questions From Cencora’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Cencora’s first quarter results came in below Wall Street’s revenue expectations, and the market responded negatively. Management pointed to several factors behind the underperformance, including faster-than-expected brand-to-biosimilar conversions at a large mail order pharmacy customer, impacts from recent manufacturer price reductions, and lingering effects from the loss of certain customers. CEO Robert Mauch emphasized the resilience of Cencora’s business model, noting ongoing growth in spec
